title: Invisible ladders and rails
description: This texture pack contains invisible minecraft ladders and invisible minecraft rails
body:
This texture pack works well with the TrainCarts plugin. It'll make your roller coaster even cooler, as it slides over blocks without any track. The ladders are handy for creating loops with the TrainCarts plugin.

Link TrainCarts Plugin: [https://modrinth.com/plugin/traincarts](https://modrinth.com/plugin/traincarts)
